hero.title: Join Our Community
hero.description: Be a part of our amazing community and collaborate on projects.

about.title: About the ISCTE-IUL ACM Student Chapter
about.description: We are the ISCTE-IUL Student Chapter of the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM), a vibrant community dedicated to advancing computing as a science and profession. Our chapter brings together passionate students to collaborate, learn, and innovate in the field of computer science and emerging technologies.
about.innovationDesc: Explore cutting-edge technologies and work on innovative projects that solve real-world problems.
about.collaborationDesc: Connect with fellow students and professionals to build meaningful relationships and partnerships.
about.learningDesc: Enhance your skills through workshops, seminars, and hands-on experiences with industry experts.
about.aboutPageSubtitle: Learn more about the ISCTE-IUL Student Chapter of the Association for Computing Machinery
about.whoWeAreDesc1: The ISCTE-IUL Student Chapter of the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM) is a vibrant community of students passionate about computing, technology, and innovation. We are part of ACM, the world's largest educational and scientific computing society, dedicated to advancing computing as a science and profession.
about.whoWeAreDesc2: Our chapter serves students at ISCTE-Instituto Universitário de Lisboa, fostering collaboration, learning, and professional development in the field of computer science and related disciplines.
about.mission1: Promoting excellence in computing education and professional practice
about.mission2: Creating opportunities for members to connect, collaborate, and grow
about.mission3: Inspiring innovation and fostering a culture of continuous learning
about.mission4: Building bridges between academia and industry
about.workshopsDesc: We organize regular workshops and seminars covering emerging technologies, best practices, and industry insights to enhance our members' skills.
about.networkingDesc: Connect with fellow students, professionals, and industry leaders through our networking events and social gatherings.
about.hackathomsDesc: Participate in hackathons and coding competitions to challenge yourself and showcase your talents.
about.projectsDesc: Work on innovative projects with your peers and contribute to real-world solutions in computing.
about.whyJoinIntro: Joining the ISCTE-IUL ACM Student Chapter opens doors to countless opportunities for personal and professional growth:
about.benefit1: Access to exclusive events, workshops, and learning resources
about.benefit2: Network with like-minded students and industry professionals
about.benefit4: Be part of a global ACM community of computing professionals
about.benefit5: Enhance your resume and career prospects
about.readyToJoinDesc: Whether you're a beginner or an experienced programmer, there's a place for you in our community. Connect with us today and become part of the future of computing!

blog.title: Latest Blog Posts
blog.description: Stay updated with the latest ACM news, events, and announcements.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.description: Explore the innovative projects we've been working on to make an impact.
